# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_multimodal_retriever_retrieve_batch_no_longer_uses_type_ignore_for_query_embs__a1():
    """
    The review change removes the `# type: ignore` on the `query_embs=query_embeddings` argument.
    This test enforces that `query_by_embedding_batch` is called with `query_embs=query_embeddings`
    without `# type: ignore` on the same line.

    Fails on before-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore`)
    Passes on after-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,`).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/haystack/nodes/retriever/multimodal/retriever.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'query_by_embedding_batch' in source, 'Expected retrieve_batch to call query_by_embedding_batch().'

def test_multimodal_retriever_retrieve_batch_no_longer_uses_type_ignore_for_query_embs__a2():
    """
    The review change removes the `# type: ignore` on the `query_embs=query_embeddings` argument.
    This test enforces that `query_by_embedding_batch` is called with `query_embs=query_embeddings`
    without `# type: ignore` on the same line.

    Fails on before-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore`)
    Passes on after-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,`).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/haystack/nodes/retriever/multimodal/retriever.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'query_embs=query_embeddings' in source, 'Expected retrieve_batch to pass query_embs=query_embeddings to query_by_embedding_batch().'

def test_multimodal_retriever_retrieve_batch_no_longer_uses_type_ignore_for_query_embs__a3():
    """
    The review change removes the `# type: ignore` on the `query_embs=query_embeddings` argument.
    This test enforces that `query_by_embedding_batch` is called with `query_embs=query_embeddings`
    without `# type: ignore` on the same line.

    Fails on before-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore`)
    Passes on after-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,`).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/haystack/nodes/retriever/multimodal/retriever.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore' not in source, "Expected query_embs=query_embeddings to be passed without '# type: ignore' (it was removed in the fix)."

def test_multimodal_retriever_retrieve_batch_no_longer_uses_type_ignore_for_query_embs__a4():
    """
    The review change removes the `# type: ignore` on the `query_embs=query_embeddings` argument.
    This test enforces that `query_by_embedding_batch` is called with `query_embs=query_embeddings`
    without `# type: ignore` on the same line.

    Fails on before-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore`)
    Passes on after-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,`).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/haystack/nodes/retriever/multimodal/retriever.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    pattern = '^\\s*query_embs=query_embeddings,\\s*(#.*)?$'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, source, flags=re.MULTILINE)
    assert matches, "Expected to find a line 'query_embs=query_embeddings,' in the source."

def test_multimodal_retriever_retrieve_batch_no_longer_uses_type_ignore_for_query_embs__a5():
    """
    The review change removes the `# type: ignore` on the `query_embs=query_embeddings` argument.
    This test enforces that `query_by_embedding_batch` is called with `query_embs=query_embeddings`
    without `# type: ignore` on the same line.

    Fails on before-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,  # type: ignore`)
    Passes on after-code (has `query_embs=query_embeddings,`).
    """
    source = open('/workspace/haystack/nodes/retriever/multimodal/retriever.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    pattern = '^\\s*query_embs=query_embeddings,\\s*(#.*)?$'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, source, flags=re.MULTILINE)
    assert all((m == '' for m in matches)), "Expected 'query_embs=query_embeddings,' line to have no inline comment (especially not '# type: ignore')."
